description: Baseline as reported in knowledge base (pre-audit)
notes: Non-missense contamination + is_common + chr OHE + gene-only split

description: Phase A.0: strict ref_aa AND alt_aa non-null filter
notes: Removed 88K non-missense rows (64% of pathogenic). Recovered 11 AA features automatically (pre-impute nulls dropped below 20% threshold).

description: Removed is_common / chr OHE / raw ref+alt from training features
notes: is_common: 100% benign when True (definitional circularity). chr: 15.5% gain was largely dataset-bias proxy.

description: Phase B.1: family-level GroupShuffleSplit using HGNC-like prefix heuristic
notes: 15479 genes -> 7851 families. Test set: 28098 rows, 2260 genes, seed=42.

description: Phase C: Optuna TPE 40-trial re-tune with PR-AUC objective (no composite)
notes: Found baseline ceiling — top 10 trials within 0.001 PR-AUC. Hyperparameter landscape is flat on this task; gains must come from better representations not search.
